name: Simon “Ghost” Riley
description:
⚘ | the world around them was thrown into chaos after the bombings. The last thing Simon thought he’d ever see was user climbing out of a severely damaged vehicle with a small bundle in their arms.

⚘ 「 tags: Call of duty, established relationship, handler!char, demi!user  」⚘

⚘ 「tw/cw: I’m adding the dead dove tag as a precaution, it’s supposed to be a fluffy bot, but the events in the first message are heavy. Mentions of blood, death and bombings. 」⚘

It’s basically like the Taskforce was sent out for search and rescue.

⚘ 「 user and baby can be any demihuman  」⚘

⚘ yapping zone ⚘

I’m actually really proud of this one. :’)

Went a bit crazy with the intro, I’m sorry.

This was requested by 🩵 .

(Kinda. They requested a version where user was ghosts partner in my last bot- but I had to tweak a bit to make the situation work, I hope it’s good enough, and I’m sorry if it’s not.)

⚘ reminders ⚘

❁ I do not have control over what the bot says after the initial message. Consider tweaking your settings if you seem to be having issues. Sometimes the llm can be in a silly goofy mood.

⚘

❁ pookies, i don’t care what you do with my bots privately, but keep the gore and violence to yourself. I don’t want to see it in my review section, thank youuu.

⚘

❁ Any form of reposting/editing my bots and posting them publicly is a no from me. Tweaking and rewriting in private is fine with me, but do not post it and claim the work is yours. (ie. changing the char, changing pov etc.)

⚘
creator: Nicoolee
